default.description: Generic event thresholds that do not require genre metadata.

festival_edm.description: Favor stronger release and accent thresholds for large-scale EDM drops.

electro_pop.description: Slightly lower vocal and hook thresholds with medium release strictness.

alt_rock.description: Bias toward punch and reset events over wide explosive releases.

dark_electronic.description: Favor tension-hold and atmospheric plateaus while preserving drop detection.

downtempo.description: Lower intensity ceilings and softer release expectations.
